summary: Bullish recovery from Jun 9 SSL sweep (28,204) but price now at 80% of D1 range in deep premium approaching ATH supply at 30,776. No KZ active. Wait for pullback to 29,794-30,018 or BSL sweep+rejection at 30,776.

ict_analysis.daily_bias: Bullish recovery. SSL sweep at 28,204 (Jun 9) +7.2% displacement rally. D1 structure: 2x HH+HL. But at 80.2% of DR (28,205-30,776) = deep premium. ATH 30,776 is BSL target. Macro trend still bullish.
ict_analysis.h4_context: H4 DR stale (price at 255%). Bullish FVGs stacked below: 30,165-30,198, 29,744-29,957. Price in extreme premium. Bullish OB at 30,166-30,182. Bearish reaction at 30,318 high. SMT bullish (NAS held, US500 swept).
ict_analysis.m15_status: No KZ active (09:00 UTC). Bearish FVG 30,230-30,262. Consolidating after London rally. NY AM KZ (13:00-16:00 UTC) is key window. No valid entry setup yet — wait for KZ + OB formation.

risks.event: Price at 80% Fib — deep premium near ATH supply
Low H4 volume (0.36x avg) — weak conviction

recommendation: NO_GO. Bias is bullish but entry conditions not met: (1) price in deep premium at 80% of D1 range, (2) no Kill Zone active for M15 confirmation, (3) approaching major ATH supply at 30,776. Walker conf=55 below CONDITIONAL_GO threshold (60). Wait for pullback to 29,794-30,018 (61.8-70.5% Fib) for long entry, or BSL sweep+rejection at 30,776 for short. The trade was the recovery from 28,204 — that move is done.
